title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast from New York Tech Week covers how AI is transforming software engineering roles, the trend of companies exhausting AI budgets rapidly (tokenmaxxing), NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling 120-billion-parameter models on personal computers, and universities' challenges integrating AI literacy into curricula as workplaces evolve.
